description: This file contains React component definitions for various primitive UI components such as Card, Legend, BarChartLike, LineChartLike, PieChartLike, Gauge, and SimpleTable, which are used to build user interfaces with visualizations and layout elements.

methods.name: Card({ title, subtitle, children, actions, roleBadge, ariaLabel })
methods.description: Accessible card container with optional header that displays title, subtitle, actions, and role badge.

methods.name: Legend({ items })
methods.description: A simple legend component showing colored dots with labels.

methods.name: BarChartLike({ data, xKey, yKey, color = "#3b82f6", maxHeight = 140 })
methods.description: A lightweight bar chart component that visualizes data as bars.

methods.name: LineChartLike({ data, xKey, yKey, color = "#10b981" })
methods.description: A simple sparkline-like line chart component.

methods.name: PieChartLike({ parts })
methods.description: A radial pie/donut chart component using conic gradient.

methods.name: Gauge({ value, max = 100, label = "Gauge", color = "#f59e0b" })
methods.description: A semi-circle gauge component displaying a percentage value.

methods.name: SimpleTable({ columns, rows })
methods.description: A basic table component with configurable columns and rows, supporting custom cell rendering.

ctags.name: BarChartLike
ctags.pattern: /^export function BarChartLike({ data, xKey, yKey, color = "#3b82f6", maxHeight = 140 }) {$/

ctags.name: Card
ctags.pattern: /^export function Card({ title, subtitle, children, actions, roleBadge, ariaLabel }) {$/
ctags.signature: ({ title, subtitle, children, actions, roleBadge, ariaLabel })

ctags.name: Gauge
ctags.pattern: /^export function Gauge({ value, max = 100, label = "Gauge", color = "#f59e0b" }) {$/

ctags.name: LineChartLike
ctags.pattern: /^export function LineChartLike({ data, xKey, yKey, color = "#10b981" }) {$/
